description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that cross-compiles and tests the fprime-community/fprime-workshop-led-blinker repository on AArch64 Linux. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events to devel and release branches, and cancel in-progress runs if a newer run is started. It should use a reusable workflow to get the target branch, cross-compile the code, and run integration tests on a self-hosted AArch64 Linux environment.
